message:
feat(sandbox): restore security sandbox files (WIP)

Restore edgebox_wamr.zig and dependencies for security-controlled
WASM execution. The sandbox provides:
- Controlled HTTP (host-mediated requests)
- Restricted crypto (randomness only)
- CPU/gas metering
- Virtual filesystem

Build target added but needs h2 module dependencies to be configured:
- gzip, netpoller, green_thread, hashmap_helper modules

Current state: sandbox target exists, needs module setup to compile.
